name: add_km_rate_to_contacts
description: Add km_rate column to contacts table for per-client trip billing rate. Allows each client to have a configurable per-km rate (e.g., €0.35/km) used when generating invoices from trips.
up: ALTER TABLE contacts ADD COLUMN km_rate DECIMAL(10,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Per-km billing rate for trip invoicing'
down: ALTER TABLE contacts DROP COLUMN km_rate
